title: Improvements urgently needed when exporting the Portfolio view/snapshot
excerpt:
Hi, Please can I request some improvements to exporting from the Portfolio view?

posts.author: TDT (Tamasine Thompson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Please can I request some improvements to exporting from the Portfolio view?

The Excel export misses out so much key information from the Portfolio main board - can this be updated to be a proper, full export showing all columns (and contents)? A pdf here would ne fine if it included all the info but currently Excel is the only option

Also the pdf version of the snapshot is equivalent to a screen snip. Can that be upgraded please to include all of the data in the snapshot and not just those items visible on screen at one time?

This is super important to me because the whole point of the portfolio view is reporting, right? But without being able to regularly save/date the view for our records it’s almost useless and we are still having to duplicate our work in Excel

posts.author: TDT (Tamasine Thompson)
posts.cookedHtml: Also… is it possible please to add an option to the Project Health dropdown of “On Hold”
